name: f1_race_predictor
description: Predict pole position and race winner for any upcoming F1 race using multi-factor scoring: recent form (30%), circuit history (25%), team strength (20%), track type advantage (15%), weather fit (10%).
instructions: Call with {"round": 5} or {"circuit": "Monaco"} to get top-5 predicted pole sitter and race winner with confidence percentages and key factors.
